turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, cancel karna hai mera appointment. Actually teen appointments hain — mujhe, meri wife ko, aur bete ko.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Teen appointments! Zaroor. Ek ek karke details lijiye mujhse.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Main hoon Anil Godbole, meri wife Sushma Godbole, aur beta Tejas Godbole. Teeno ka kal tha alag alag departments mein.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Dekh raha hoon... haan, teeno records mil gaye. Sab kal ke hain. Teeno cancel kar doon?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, urgent travel aa gaya humara.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Samajh gaya. Teeno appointments cancel ho gayi — Anil, Sushma, aur Tejas Godbole. SMS jaayega confirm karne ke liye. Safe travel!

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thank you, wapas aakar nayi date lenge.
